    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    OfferTile
    Board.getCopyTilePlayerIsOn(Player player)
    Returns a defensive copy of the offer tile the given player is currently on.

    BoardView.getCopyTilePlayerIsOn(Player player)
    Returns a defensive copy of the offer tile the given player is currently on.
    boolean
    Board.isPlayerOnAnEligibleDefaultTile(Player player)
    Returns true if the given player is on a default tile whose food reward is >= 0.
    boolean

    Returns true if the given player is on a default tile that grants a food bonus.

  • Uses of Player in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Controller

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Controller that return types with arguments of type Player
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Player>
    Controller.getAllPlayers()
    Returns all players currently in the game.
    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Controller with parameters of type Player
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Controller.addPlayer(Player player)
    Adds a player to the game lobby.
    void
    Controller.createGame(Player playerHost, int playerNumber)
    Initializes the Game model with the host player and the required player count.
    void
    Controller.loadGame(Player player)
    Loads a saved game from disk and restores the game state.
    void
    Controller.placingPlayer(Player playerToPlace, int position)
    Places the player's totem on the offer tile at the given board position during the placing phase.
    void
    Controller.playerDoNothing(Player player)
    Handles the action of a player attempting to pass or skip their turn.
    void
    Controller.reconnectLoadedPlayer(Player player)
    Registers the reconnection of a player to a loaded game, marking them as connected.
    void
    Controller.selectCardFromBottomList(Player player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Lets the player pick a tribe member or building from the previous-round (bottom) market row.
    void
    Controller.selectCardFromTopList(Player player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Lets the player pick a tribe member or building from the current-round (top) market row.
    void
    Controller.selectExtraCard(Player player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Resolves the bonus draw granted by the draw-one-more mechanic: picks the chosen card from the top market row and adds it to the player's tribe.
    void
    Controller.skipExtraDraw(Player player)
    Called when the player declines the extra draw granted by the draw-one-more building effect.

  • Uses of Player in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Effect.Building

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Effect.Building with parameters of type Player
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    BuilderDoublePP.applyEffect(Player player)
    Doubles the finalPrestigePoint value of each Builder card in the player's tribe.
    abstract void
    BuildingEffect.applyEffect(Player player)
    Applies this building's effect to the given player.
    void
    BuildingEffectInterface.applyEffect(Player player)
    Applies this building's effect to the given player.
    void
    DiscountFoodOnSustenance.applyEffect(Player player)
    Awards one food per tribe member of the configured type.
    void
    DoublePPOnShamanEvent.applyEffect(Player player)
    First invocation (before the event): snapshots the player's current PP.
    void
    DrawOneMoreCard.applyEffect(Player player)
    Applies the "draw one more card" effect.
    void
    FoodOnNewCoupleInventors.applyEffect(Player player)
    Compares the player's current tribe with the tribe state from the previous evaluation.
    void
    NoPPLostOnShaman.applyEffect(Player player)
    First invocation (before the event): snapshots the player's current PP.
    void
    OnEventHuntOneFoodAndOnePPPerHunter.applyEffect(Player player)
    Awards the player 1 food and 1 PP per Hunter card in their tribe.
    void
    OnEventPaintingsOneFoodPerArtist.applyEffect(Player player)
    Awards the player 1 food per Artist card in their tribe.
    void
    PlusOneFoodOnReturnDefaultTile.applyEffect(Player player)
    Awards 1 food if the player is currently on a default tile with a non-negative food reward.
    void
    PPPerCharType.applyEffect(Player player)
    Awards prestigePoint PP for each tribe member of the configured cardType.
    void
    SetSixCard.applyEffect(Player player)
    Counts one of each of the six card types among newly added tribe members.
    void
    SixFoodCompletedSet.applyEffect(Player player)
    On the first invocation, initialises the card-type counters and snapshots the tribe.
    void
    ThreeMoreShamanStar.applyEffect(Player player)
    First invocation (before the event): adds a temporary 3-star Shaman card to the tribe.
    void
    TwentyFivePPEndGame.applyEffect(Player player)
    Awards the player 25 prestige points.

  • Uses of Player in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Effect.Event

    Method parameters in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Effect.Event with type arguments of type Player
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ArtistEvent.solveEvent(List<Player> playersList)
    Applies the artist event: rewards qualifying players and penalises the rest, then triggers all PAINTINGS building effects.
    void
    EventEffectInterface.solveEvent(List<Player> playersList)
    Applies this event's effect to all players.
    void
    HuntEvent.solveEvent(List<Player> playersList)
    Applies the hunt event: gives food and Hunter-based PP to all players, then triggers all HUNT building effects.
    void
    ShamanEvent.solveEvent(List<Player> playersList)
    Applies the shamanic ritual event: Triggers SHAMANIC_RIT building effects (first pass — snapshot phase). Finds the maximum and minimum Shaman-star totals among all players. Awards/deducts PP accordingly. Triggers SHAMANIC_RIT building effects again (second pass — resolution phase).
    void
    SustenanceEvent.solveEvent(List<Player> playersList)
    Solves the sustenance event for all players: each tribe member costs foodPerCharacter food; gatherers discount 3 food each.

  • Uses of Player in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game that return Player
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Player
    TurnManager.getNextPlacingPlayer()
    Returns the next placing player and removes them from the placing-order queue, automatically skipping any DISCONNECTED players until a connected one is found.
    Player
    TurnManager.getNextPlayingPlayer()
    Returns the next playing player and removes them from the playing-order queue, automatically skipping any DISCONNECTED players until a connected one is found.
    Player
    Game.getPlayerToPlace()
    Returns the player whose turn it is to place during the placing phase.
    Player
    Game.getPlayerToPlay()
    Returns the player whose turn it is to resolve actions during the playing phase.
    Player
    Game.getSpecificPlayer(Player player)
    Returns the model Player instance that matches the given player's nickname.
    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game that return types with arguments of type Player
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Player>
    Game.checkWinner()
    Determines the winner(s) at game end and notifies all observers.
    List<Player>
    TurnManager.getPlacingOrder()
    Returns the current (unmodified) placing-order queue.
    List<Player>
    Game.getPlayerList()
    Returns the list of all players in this game.
    List<Player>
    GameView.getPlayerList()
    Returns the ordered list of all players participating in the game.
    List<Player>
    TurnManager.getPlayingOrder()
    Returns the current (unmodified) playing-order queue.
    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game with parameters of type Player
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Game.addPlayer(Player player)
    this method tries to add a player, in case the lobby is already full it does nothing.
    void
    Market.buyBuildingBottomList(int position, Player player)
    Purchases a building from the bottom row and adds it to the player's buildings.
    void
    Market.buyBuildingTopList(int position, Player player)
    Purchases a building from the top row and adds it to the player's buildings.
    void
    Market.buyExtraBuildingFromSnapshot(int position, Player player)
    Buys a building from the end-of-round snapshot (not the current top row) and adds it to the player's buildings.
    Player
    Game.getSpecificPlayer(Player player)
    Returns the model Player instance that matches the given player's nickname.
    void
    Game.placePlayer(Player player, int position)
    Places a player on an offer tile during the placing phase.
    void
    TurnManager.reAddPlayer(Player player)
    Re-adds a reconnected player to the end of both turn queues, provided they are not already present.
    void
    Game.reAddToTurnQueues(Player player)
    Re-adds a reconnected player to the end of both turn queues.
    void
    Game.removeFromTurnQueues(Player player)
    Removes the given player from both the placing and playing turn queues immediately.
    void
    TurnManager.removePlayer(Player player)
    Removes a disconnected player from both the placing and playing queues immediately.
    void
    Market.selectCardFromBottomList(int position, Player player)
    Draws a card from the bottom row and adds it to the player's tribe.
    void
    Market.selectCardFromTopList(int position, Player player)
    Draws a card from the top row and adds it to the player's tribe.
    void
    Market.selectExtraCardFromSnapshot(int position, Player player)
    Draws a tribe card from the end-of-round snapshot (not the current top row) and adds it to the player's tribe.
    void
    Game.selectExtraCardFromTopList(CARD_TYPE cardType, int position, Player player)
    Draws one extra card from the top market row for the given player without touching the offer-tile action counter.
    void
    Game.selectGenericCardBottomLists(CARD_TYPE toBuyCardType, int position, Player player)
    Selects a card from the bottom list and adds it to the player, then decrements the player's remaining bottom-draw actions.
    void
    Game.selectGenericCardTopLists(CARD_TYPE toBuyCardType, int position, Player player)
    this method adds a card from the top list
    Constructors in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game with parameters of type Player
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Game(Player playerHost, int playerNumber)
    default constructor of game, this method when called creates the deck and the buildings by launching the factories.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    GameObserver.onGameChanged(ERA currentEra, List<Player> players, GAME_PHASE gamePhase, Player playerToPlace, Player playerToPlay)
    Called once at game start to push the full initial state to the observer.
    void
    GameObserver.onPlayerAdded(Player playerAdded)
    Called when a new player joins the lobby.
    void
    GameObserver.onPlayerToPlaceChanged(Player newPlayerToPlace)
    Called when it is a new player's turn to place their totem.
    void
    GameObserver.onPlayerToPlayChanged(Player newPlayerToPlay)
    Called when it is a new player's turn to resolve their offer-tile actions.
    void
    BoardObserver.playerPlacedOnOffertile(Player player, int tilePosition)
    the player has been moved to the index

    Called once at game start to push the full initial state to the observer.

  • Uses of Player in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer with parameters of type Player
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ServerVirtualView.onGameChanged(ERA currentEra, List<Player> players, GAME_PHASE gamePhase, Player playerToPlace, Player playerToPlay)
    Updates the era and game-phase snapshots, clears the current-turn fields, and sends the initial game state to the client.
    void
    ServerVirtualView.onPlayerAdded(Player playerAdded)
    Adds the player to the local snapshot map and notifies the client of the new lobby entry.
    void
    ServerVirtualView.onPlayerToPlaceChanged(Player newPlayerToPlace)
    Updates the current player for the placing phase and notifies the client.
    void
    ServerVirtualView.onPlayerToPlayChanged(Player newPlayerToPlay)
    Updates the current player for the action phase and notifies the client.
    void
    ServerVirtualView.playerPlacedOnOffertile(Player player, int tilePosition)
    Notifies the client that a player has placed their totem on an offer tile.
    Method parameters in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer with type arguments of type Player
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ServerVirtualView.gameWinners(List<Player> winners)
    Saves the list of winners in the local snapshot and notifies the client that the game is over.
    void
    ServerVirtualView.onGameChanged(ERA currentEra, List<Player> players, GAME_PHASE gamePhase, Player playerToPlace, Player playerToPlay)
    Updates the era and game-phase snapshots, clears the current-turn fields, and sends the initial game state to the client.
    void
    ServerVirtualView.playerToDefaultTile(List<Player> playerOrder)
    Notifies the client of the order in which players are on the default tile at the end of the placing phase.
